howItWorks.title: Simple Process
howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Our AI-driven platform simplifies legal document verification in three easy steps.

step1.title: 1. Upload Document
step1.description: Easily upload your legal documents through our secure platform.

step2.title: 2. AI Analysis
step2.description: Our AI scans and analyzes the document for potential legal risks.

step3.title: 3. Receive Report
step3.description: Get a detailed analysis report with flagged issues in minutes.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.heading: Key Features
features.description: Our AI-driven platform offers comprehensive analysis of legal documents with these key features.

riskIdentification.title: Risk Identification
riskIdentification.description: AI flags clauses with potential legal risks, highlighting areas that need attention.

contextualInsights.title: Context-Aware Insights
contextualInsights.description: Highlights vague or problematic phrasing with contextual understanding of legal language.

speedAccuracy.title: Speed and Accuracy
speedAccuracy.description: Analyzes contracts in seconds, reducing human workload while maintaining high accuracy.

customizable.title: Customizable Reviews
customizable.description: Set specific parameters to match your law firm's requirements and standards.

secure.description: End-to-end encryption to protect sensitive documents and client information.

integration.title: Integration-Ready
integration.description: Seamlessly integrates with your existing legal software and document management systems.

whyChoose.title: Competitive Advantages
whyChoose.heading: Why Choose Our AI?
whyChoose.description: See how our AI-driven solution compares to traditional manual review processes.

traditional.title: Traditional Review
traditional.description: A 50-page contract takes an average of 5-7 hours for manual review by a legal professional.
traditional.costDescription: Average cost of 3000-5000 kr per hour for review by a lawyer clerk.

ai.title: AI-Driven Review
ai.description: Our AI analyzes the same 50-page contract in minutes, with human review only for flagged issues.
ai.costDescription: Subscription-based pricing with unlimited document analysis.

reviews.name: Halo Chen
reviews.comment: This AI tool has transformed our contract review process. What used to take days now takes hours, allowing our lawyers to focus on higher-value work.

reviews.name: Isabelle Tang
reviews.comment: The accuracy in risk identification has been impressive. We've caught several critical issues that could have been overlooked in our standard review process.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Legal Document Review?
cta.description: Join leading law firms already saving hundreds of hours on contract review.

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about our AI-powered legal document verification.

accuracy.question: How accurate is the AI at identifying legal risks?
accuracy.answer: Our AI has been trained on millions of legal documents and achieves over 98% accuracy in identifying common legal risks and issues. The system continuously improves through machine learning and feedback from legal professionals.

security.question: Are my data secure and confidential?
security.answer: Absolutely. We use end-to-end encryption and strict data security protocols. Your documents are never permanently stored, and we comply with all relevant data protection regulations including GDPR. We also offer on-premise deployment options for firms with stricter security requirements.

documentTypes.question: What types of legal documents can the AI analyze?
documentTypes.answer: Our AI can analyze a wide range of legal documents including contracts, NDAs, employment agreements, lease agreements, terms of service, privacy policies, and more. The system is particularly effective with standardized legal documents but can also handle customized agreements.

jurisdictions.question: How does the AI handle different jurisdictions?
jurisdictions.answer: The AI has been trained on legal documents from multiple jurisdictions including Chinese laws,US federal and state laws, EU regulations, and UK law. You can specify the relevant jurisdiction when uploading documents, and the AI will apply the appropriate legal standards and considerations.

replacement.question: Can the AI replace our legal team?
replacement.answer: No, our AI is designed to supplement your legal team, not replace it. The AI handles the time-consuming initial review and flags potential issues, allowing your legal professionals to focus their expertise on analysis, strategy, and client consultation. It's a tool that makes your legal team more efficient and effective.

integrations.question: What integrations are available?
integrations.answer: Our platform integrates with popular legal document management systems including Clio, DocuSign, iManage, and NetDocuments. We also offer API access for custom integrations with your existing workflows and systems.

footer.description: AI-powered legal document verification platform helping legal professionals save time and reduce risks.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introductionText: At LegalEdge ("we", "our", or "us"), we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our website and services.
privacy.informationCollectText: We collect several types of information from and about users of our services, including:
privacy.personalInfo: Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number, billing information, and other information you provide when creating an account or using our services.
privacy.documentInfo: Document Information: Content of legal documents you upload for analysis.
privacy.usageInfo: Usage Information: Information about how you use our website and services, including IP address, browser type, device information, and pages visited.
privacy.howWeUseText: We use the information we collect to:
privacy.provideServices: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
privacy.processTransactions: Process transactions and send related information
privacy.respondRequests: Respond to your comments, questions, and requests
privacy.sendNotices: Send you technical notices, updates, security alerts, and support messages
privacy.monitorTrends: Monitor and analyze trends, usage, and activities in connection with our services
privacy.detectIssues: Detect, prevent, and address technical issues
privacy.protectActivity: Protect against harmful, unauthorized, or illegal activity
privacy.documentSecurityText: All documents uploaded to our platform are encrypted in transit and at rest. We use industry-standard security measures to protect your data.
privacy.documentRetentionText: By default, we do not permanently store your documents after analysis is complete. Documents are automatically deleted from our servers within 30 days unless you specifically request longer retention.
privacy.sharingText: We may share your information with:
privacy.serviceProviders: Service Providers: Third-party vendors who provide services on our behalf, such as payment processing, data analysis, email delivery, and customer service.
privacy.legalRequirements: Legal Requirements: When required by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities.
privacy.businessTransfers: Business Transfers: In connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets.
privacy.noSell: We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
privacy.yourRightsText: Depending on your location, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information, including:
privacy.correctionRight: Correction of inaccurate or incomplete information
privacy.exerciseRights: To exercise these rights, please contact us at privacy@legalverifyai.com.
privacy.cookiesText: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our website and hold certain information. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent.
privacy.dataSecurityText: We have implemented appropriate technical and organizational measures to secure your personal information from accidental loss and unauthorized access, use, alteration, and disclosure.
privacy.securityNote: However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your personal information, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.
privacy.internationalTransfersText: Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries other than the country in which you reside. These countries may have data protection laws that are different from the laws of your country.
privacy.safeguardsText: We have taken appropriate safeguards to ensure that your personal information remains protected in accordance with this Privacy Policy.
privacy.childrenPrivacyText: Our services are not intended for individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 18. If we learn we have collected personal information from a child under 18, we will delete that information.
privacy.changesText: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last Updated" date.
privacy.contactText: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.welcome: Welcome to LegalEdge ("Company", "we", "our", or "us"). These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of our AI-powered legal document analysis platform and any related services or applications (collectively, the "Service").
terms.agreement: By accessing or using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use our Service.
terms.serviceDescriptionText: Our platform uses AI technology to analyze legal documents, identify potentially problematic clauses, and suggest improvements. The insights provided are for informational purposes only and do not constitute legal advice. We do not replace licensed attorneys.
terms.eligibilityText: You must be at least 18 years old and capable of forming a binding contract in your jurisdiction to use our Service.
terms.accountText: You may be required to create an account to access certain features. You agree to provide accurate information and keep your account credentials secure. You are responsible for all activity under your account.
terms.unlawful: Use the Service for unlawful purposes or in violation of any applicable laws;
terms.noRight: Upload documents that you do not have the legal right to submit;
terms.reverseEngineer: Attempt to reverse engineer, scrape, or otherwise misuse the platform;
terms.disrupt: Interfere with or disrupt the Service's functionality.
terms.userContentText: You retain ownership of the documents and content you upload ("User Content"). We do not claim ownership over your content. We process documents securely and do not share them with third parties unless required by law.
terms.note: Note: While we implement strong data security practices, we recommend redacting or anonymizing highly sensitive or personal data before uploading.
terms.intellectualPropertyText: The Service, including all software, algorithms, and content (excluding User Content), is the property of LegalEdge and protected by intellectual property laws. You may not use our branding, code, or content without permission.
terms.disclaimerText: The Service does not provide legal advice. All outputs from our AI system are automated and provided for general information only. You should consult a qualified attorney for legal advice specific to your situation.
terms.noWarrantiesText: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available." We make no warranties, express or implied, including but not limited to merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement.
terms.limitationText: To the maximum extent permitted by law, LegalEdge shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from or relating to your use of the Service.
terms.terminationText: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the Service at any time, with or without notice, for conduct that violates these Terms or is otherwise harmful to the Service or other users.
terms.modificationsText: We may update these Terms from time to time. We'll notify you of significant changes by posting the updated Terms on our website. Continued use of the Service after changes means you accept the updated Terms.
terms.governingLawText: These Terms shall be governed by and interpreted in accordance with Norwegian laws, without regard to conflict of law principles.
terms.contactText: For any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:
terms.moreInfo: For more information about how we handle your data, please review our
